overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through rural countryside at sunset. The scene transitions from open golden fields to a small village with thatched-roof huts, featuring dramatic red and orange sky lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside path with golden grass fields

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a dirt path through open grassland, passing a large leaning tree on the left

entered.detail: tall solitary tree leaning slightly to the right with dense foliage
winding dirt trail through the grassland
tall golden-brown grass covering the open field
dense tree line marking the horizon
sparse wooden fence posts visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through open countryside at sunset. A large leaning tree stands prominently to the left while golden grass fields stretch to the right, with a distant forest line visible against the dramatic red sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: stream crossing with wooden fence and village approach

events.description: character steps into shallow stream water crossing the dirt path
first thatched roof hut comes into view on the right marking the village approach

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking, crossing a small stream and passing alongside a wooden fence as the first village structures appear

entered.detail: shallow water crossing the dirt path reflecting the sunset
traditional wooden hut with steep thatched roof
tall evergreen tree standing against the sky
low stone wall running parallel to the path
wooden directional sign beside the path

segments.scene_description: The path crosses a shallow stream as the scenery transitions toward a settled area. A wooden fence runs close along the right side and the first thatched-roof hut appears. The open fields and large tree are left behind as stone walls and pine trees come into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with thatched huts and stone walls

events.description: passing a seated villager NPC resting on a stone wall to the left

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through the village outskirts, passing a seated villager and approaching the cluster of thatched-roof buildings

notable_agents.action: sitting on stone wall beside the path

entered.detail: wooden wagon or cart parked near the huts
cluster of traditional thatched-roof buildings forming the village center

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters the village proper, passing a seated villager on a stone wall to the left. Multiple thatched-roof huts now line the path as the stream and open countryside are left behind. The path continues toward the village center with wooden carts and barriers visible along the way.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the open, wild countryside into the clustered dwellings of a rural village under a dramatic sunset. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path past a large leaning tree and golden grass fields that stretch toward a distant forest line. As the path crosses a shallow stream, the open landscape gives way to a settled area marked by a wooden fence and the first appearance of a thatched-roof hut. The scene then shifts further into the village proper, passing a seated villager on a stone wall as the surrounding pine trees and stone walls replace the open fields. Finally, the camera follows the path toward the village center, moving past multiple thatched-roof huts, wooden carts, and barriers.
